scheduled-date-in-past: The scheduled date/time must be in the future.
scheduled-date-invalid: The scheduled date/time is not valid.
scheduled-date-too-far: Scheduled emails can be programmed up to 30 days in advance.
scheduled-mail-active-note: This email will not be sent now. It will be delivered at the scheduled date/time by the work queue.
scheduled-mail-error: The email could not be scheduled.
scheduled-mail-hint: Leave empty to send immediately. Scheduled emails can be programmed up to 30 days in advance.
scheduled-mail-no-recipients: At least one recipient is required.
scheduled-mail-no-worker: Could not register the scheduled email in the work queue.
